'''ladhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immanely|immanely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immanely|immanely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ladhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ladhate|ladhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ladhatesher|ladhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhatesherĂ«m|ladhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ladhatero|ladhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ladhateshĂ«|ladhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhateshĂ«m|ladhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiladhatero|gokiladhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiladhateshĂ«|gokiladhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladhateshĂ«m|gokiladhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goladhankerom|goladhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goladhankeshĂ«|goladhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goladhankeshĂ«m|goladhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goladhankeya|goladhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ladhaterom|ladhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhatemu|ladhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ladhateya|ladhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiladhaterom|gokiladhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladhatemu|gokiladhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiladhateya|gokiladhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ladhadhate|ladhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ladhadhatesher|ladhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhadhatesherĂ«m|ladhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ladhadhatero|ladhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ladhadhateshĂ«|ladhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhadhateshĂ«m|ladhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiladhadhatero|gokiladhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiladhadhateshĂ«|gokiladhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladhadhateshĂ«m|gokiladhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goladhadhankerom|goladhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goladhadhankeshĂ«|goladhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goladhadhankeshĂ«m|goladhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goladhadhankeya|goladhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ladhadhaterom|ladhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ladhadhatemu|ladhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ladhadhateya|ladhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiladhadhaterom|gokiladhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiladhadhatemu|gokiladhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiladhadhateya|gokiladhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠte|lĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠtesher|lĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠtero|lĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokilĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|golĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|golĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠterom|lĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠtemu|lĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠdhĂŠteya|lĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokilĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokilĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafdhafte|lafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafdhaftesher|lafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafdhaftesherĂ«m|lafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafdhaftero|lafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafdhafteshĂ«|lafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafdhafteshĂ«m|lafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafdhaftero|gokilafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafdhafteshĂ«|gokilafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafdhafteshĂ«m|gokilafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafdhafnkerom|golafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafdhafnkeshĂ«|golafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafdhafnkeshĂ«m|golafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafdhafnkeya|golafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafdhafterom|lafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafdhaftemu|lafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafdhafteya|lafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafdhafterom|gokilafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafdhaftemu|gokilafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafdhafteya|gokilafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
